heading: Form and style of work for departments
label: 1105 Form and style of work for departments
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office shall determine the form and style in which the printing or binding ordered by a department is executed, and the material and the size of type used, having proper regard to economy, workmanship, and the purposes for which the work is needed.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 216 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 5128 Stat. 608
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
